note: correction: supersedes earlier habs-ethynyl-methane relaxed scan record; its in-run fragment reference drifted +0.62 kcal/mol vs the M0 ledger's converged optimized fragments (silent geometry-opt non-convergence, fixed by assert_convergence). Point energies unchanged.

correction: supersedes earlier habs-methyl-methane relaxed scan record; its in-run fragment reference drifted +6.96 kcal/mol vs the M0 ledger's converged optimized fragments (silent geometry-opt non-convergence, fixed by assert_convergence). Point energies unchanged.

correction: supersedes the PBE0 record whose recomputed reference used UNOPTIMIZED library fragment geometries (drift +6.68 kcal/mol; root cause of the 2026-07-17 drift too, now fixed in relaxed_scan). Point energies unchanged; reference re-optimized at PBE0.

correction: supersedes the barrier of this record. Original barrier_kcal took the max over ALL scan points and so reported the post-transfer compression wall (+28 at 1.1 A), not a reaction barrier. Recomputed with the fixed approach-only extractor (max on the approach side to the product minimum): +1.3 kcal/mol. Provisional — coarse grid may not bracket the true product minimum, so this is a lower-bound estimate. Point energies unchanged.
